basic_details.job_title: NIELIT Data Entry Operator D Recruitment 2026 – Walk in
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology (NIELIT), Delhi Centre
basic_details.short_information: NIELIT Delhi is empanelling IT Resource Persons for deployment in Govt. offices in Delhi/NCR.

age_limit.age_details: Purely on Contract Basis (for Govt. Departments in Delhi/NCR)

qualification.details: Educational Qualification: Graduation from a recognized University. Typing Speed: Minimum 35 words per minute in English. Desirable: NIELIT CCC, O Level, or Diploma in Computer Applications. Qualifications must be from Govt. University or Govt. recognized institutions.

selection_process: Walk-in Interview / Skill Test Document Verification Empanelment for deployment as per requirement
how_to_apply: Check detailed eligibility and schedule on the official NIELIT Delhi website.
Appear for Walk-in Interview on 22 July 2026 with all original documents and self-attested copies.
No separate application form is required — candidates must report as per instructions on the website.
Venue: NIELIT Delhi Centre, Institutional Area, 16/1-2, Pankha Road, Janakpuri, New Delhi - 110058.
important_instructions: Engagement is purely on contract basis. Selected candidates will be deployed in various Govt. Departments in Delhi/NCR as per requirement. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the walk-in. Candidates must bring all original documents for verification.

Graduates with good English typing speed (35+ wpm). Candidates having computer course certificates (CCC/O Level preferred). Candidates looking for contractual Data Entry jobs in Government offices in Delhi/NCR.

faq.question: Q1. What is the walk-in date for NIELIT Delhi Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Walk-in Interview is scheduled on 22 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the monthly CTC for Data Entry Operator-D in NIELIT Delhi?
faq.answer: Consolidated CTC of ₹29,200/- per month.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum typing speed required for NIELIT Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: Minimum 35 words per minute in English.

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for NIELIT Delhi Data Entry Operator?
faq.answer: Graduation from a recognized University + typing speed of 35 wpm in English.

faq.question: Q5. Is computer course certificate mandatory for NIELIT Recruitment?
faq.answer: No, it is desirable (CCC / O Level / Diploma preferred).

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for NIELIT Delhi IT Resource Persons empanelment?
faq.answer: Candidates must appear directly for Walk-in Interview on 22 July 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the venue for NIELIT Delhi Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: NIELIT Delhi Centre, Pankha Road, Janakpuri, New Delhi - 110058.

faq.question: Q8. Is the NIELIT Data Entry Operator job permanent?
faq.answer: No. It is purely on contract basis for deployment in Govt. Departments.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for NIELIT Delhi Walk-in?
faq.answer: Graduation certificate, typing speed proof, ID proof, resume, and all original documents.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website to check NIELIT Delhi Recruitment details?
faq.answer: https://www.nielit.gov.in/NielitMain/DEL
